title: The Ancient Kingdom’s Shadow
description: On pages 4–6, this part focuses on Unknown person #4, Bonney, Vegapunk, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Kuma as Vegapunk’s satellites reveal the island’s technology and ancient past while CP0 approaches and Bonney pursues the truth about Kuma.
scene: Vegapunk’s satellites reveal the island’s technology and ancient past while CP0 approaches and Bonney pursues the truth about Kuma.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: At the Grand Line...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: KUMMA!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: WAIT!!

dialogue.speaker: Bonney
dialogue.text: Kuma- SAN!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Clark

dialogue.speaker: Bonney
dialogue.text: Kuma-san, where are you going?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Konk

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Fsseshh

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Pop!!

dialogue.speaker: Bonney
dialogue.text: KUMA...

dialogue.speaker: Vegapunk
dialogue.text: At Egghead Scrap- Yard...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You want me to get you off the island, old man??

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Why? Your lab is here right?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Ah that's right...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I've completely used up all the government's research funds and I've continued to do my research however I pleased...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Even now, the overflowing ideas won't stop!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: But this time...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The number of helpers and the number of funds, I don't have enough of them!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: One day, I want to create a kind of world with science...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A world where energy is widespread all over the world, free of charge!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: You weren't listening at all, were ya!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: What would that do for everyone?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The resources that produce energy are fought over by many countries.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: which then becomes the seed for war.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: That's correct! Humans are such foolish beings!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You can feel energy here, over there, and everywhere else!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even though the world is full of it...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If I can convert it to visible power...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The large fuse of War will be erased from the world!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Surely, science will reach that point one day!

summary: This part advances the Egghead / Vegapunk Truth through 30 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
